---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability pgContext doesn't have yet
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What's missing**

The capability, SQL surface, or workflow you need.

**Why**

The concrete use case this unblocks. Prefer a real query or schema over an
abstract description.

**Current workaround**

How you're solving this today, if at all (raw SQL, a different extension,
application-side code).

**Have you checked the roadmap?**

See [docs/roadmap.md](../../docs/roadmap.md) and
[docs/known_issues.md](../../docs/known_issues.md) — this may already be
planned or explicitly out of scope for V1.
